docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BICKNELL, DANIELLE AS TO DEFENDANT CAREY, EILEEN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
